violations.text: Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2025

Noodles were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2025

Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025

Rice, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025

Rice and noodles were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025
Employees' medicines were not stored to prevent the contamination of food, equipment, or utensils. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025
Food was observed being prepped at the 3-bay sink. Food must not be prepped at the 3-bay sink to prevent contamination. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigeration units have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2025

Food was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024

The handwashing sink in the kitchen is in poor repair. Leak observed. A plumbing system must be maintained in good repair. Per person in charge, repairs are scheduled for next week. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024

Eggs were observed held at 67 degrees Fahrenheit on the counter. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge, eggs had been out of the refrigerator for 2 hours. Eggs were relocated to the refrigerator at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024

Food was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024
Employees' medicines were not stored to prevent the contamination of food, equipment, or utensils. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024

Chemicals (cleaning wipes) were stored with food, equipment, utensils, or single service items. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024

Reduced oxygen packaged (ROP) seafood (imitation crab), labeled keep frozen, was observed thawing with the package intact in the sliding door refrigerator during time of inspection. ROP seafood must be removed from the package when thawing or the package must be cut open. The imitation crab was observed at 17 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Imitation crab package was cut open during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024
Food was observed being prepped at the 3-bay sink. Food must not be prepped at the 3-bay sink to prevent contamination. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving racks and refrigeration units have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024

The handwashing sink in the kitchen was turned off. Per person in charge, sink leaks. The person in charge turned the sink back on during time of inspection. A plumbing system must be maintained in good repair. Handwashing sink must be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024
